rows.label: qev051001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Aaaaaargh! Wrooong! That is not the
katana I seek! Ngh... Just what in
the world is wrong with it?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Is it my arm?! The quality of the
steel?! Or is it you, Gi Nagri! Are
you to blame, my apprentice?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0003
rows.name: Eep...!! M-Me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0004
rows.name:
If so, I shall cut you down without hesitation!
...Right, stay right there! Even with this failure
of a blade, I can cleave the likes of you in two![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0005
rows.name: M-Master...! Please, calm yourself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0006
rows.name:
Dreaming of the Adamantine Sword, I
have hammered steel over and over...
This makes ten thousand blades![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0007
rows.name:
Looking upon ten thousand steel
corpses imbued with my soul, how
do you expect me to calm my heart?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0008
rows.name:
...You there, Earthling. If you were
in my shoes, you wouldn't be able to
keep your sanity either, would you?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0011
rows.name: Show interest in this amusing person.

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0020
rows.name: Avoid

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0021
rows.name:
Keep your distance from this
dangerous-looking person.

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0009
rows.name:
That look in your eyes... Say no more! I
understand... I understand perfectly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0010
rows.name:
This Gi Nagri admired me in the exact
same way when he became my apprentice...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0011
rows.name:
*Sigh*... A genius attracts
people simply by breathing...
What a troublesome burden...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even among Larsians, people are
easily overwhelmed by my fierce
dedication to swordsmithing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0013
rows.name:
I can completely understand why
you would fear me... and lose
your voice out of sheer respect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Very well! I shall allow you
to aid me in achieving my dream.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0015
rows.name:
I have spent the last forty years hammering
steel in search of a blade that will never
break... the Adamantine Sword.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0016
rows.name:
It is a masterwork that will not melt even if plunged
into magma, nor shatter from a direct hit by a shooting
star... Right now, it exists only in my mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0017
rows.name:
Just imagine if such a thing existed
in reality... Well? Are you not
excited? You are, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Now, take my hand! And let us complete
this unfinished masterwork together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0019
rows.name:
Naturally, when the blade is finally completed,
I shall provide you with a suitable reward!
Leave it to me, I am a man of my word![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Excellent! From this moment on, you are
my anvil and my hammer. You will assist
me with all your heart and soul![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0021
rows.name:
First, I want you to go ask a Ma-non
blacksmith named Niilop about what the
hardest steel on this planet Mira is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0022
rows.name:
That fool is so terrified of my
overwhelming presence that she runs
away the moment I try to visit her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0023
rows.name:
Fufu! But if she's dealing with an
average nobody like you, she's sure
to listen and share what she knows![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0030
rows.name:
Niilop works on Doll armor, so she is
certain to know what the hardest steel is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0031
rows.name:
Use whatever means necessary... I want you to
skillfully extract that information! She should
be hiding in the shadows around here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Gi Nagri! Your passion for
the katana is too shallow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0033
rows.name:
To forge a katana is to pour the
entirety of the life you have
cultivated thus far into the steel![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0034
rows.name:
Half-hearted feelings will simply be blown away.
Your past, your pain... you must carry all of
it on your back when you take up the hammer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Y-Yes! Master! I was wrong!!
I'll reform my life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0036
rows.name: Exactly! Reform your life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Hm? What are you doing just standing
around over there? Do you wish to learn
the way of the katana from me as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod with your eyes sparkling eagerly.

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0041
rows.name:
Tell him you got the information
on hypersteel from Niilop.

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0038
rows.name:
I see, I see! You
certainly show promise![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0039
rows.name:
However, these are my trade secrets...
I cannot teach you unless you
contribute far more to my cause.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0040
rows.name:
...What? You learned the refining
method for hypersteel from Niilop?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0041
rows.name:
Fufu, no need to be so shy.
You'll find life much easier
if you're honest, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0042
rows.name:
I suppose when faced with a genius like myself, jealousy
takes hold and you instinctively want to deny my existence.
I can somewhat understand that feeling, however...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Well, it's fine. Hurry up
and tell me the refining
method for that hypersteel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0044
rows.name:
...Hmm... I see... Combining
Dark Cinnabar and Zagyrin Rock
is quite a fascinating idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0045
rows.name:
Fufu! With this, I can definitely
forge a katana that will never
break, no matter what it cuts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0046
rows.name:
Excellent. Then, [ST:playername ], I need you
to fetch those materials next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0047
rows.name:
In the meantime, I shall reflect
upon my passion for the katana...
and look back upon my life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0048
rows.name:
Pouring the entirety of my being into the
steel before me... Heh... It is an exhausting
task, even for a genius like myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0049
rows.name:
Yes... For forty years... I have
chased after a single passion, betting
my entire life on the katana...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0050
rows.name:
Heheh... Hurry up and fetch the Dark
Cinnabar and Zagyrin Rock. I'll show you
my dream turning into reality with them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0051
rows.name: ...You've returned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0052
rows.name:
Heh... Through deep introspection, I have finally
reached a state of enlightenment! As long as I have
the materials, I can swing this hammer at any time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0053
rows.name:
The Adamantine Sword once felt like it
was shrouded in a thick fog... but now,
I can finally see its true shape![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0054
rows.name:
The masterwork that has consumed half my
life! I shall forge it by pouring every
single drop of my passion into the steel!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0050
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask De Zing what his passion is.

rows.label: qev051001_JNK0060
rows.name: Demand

rows.label: qev051001_SEL0061
rows.name: Tell De Zing it is time for your reward.

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0055
rows.name:
...You wish to know? Since you have
cooperated with me this far, I suppose I
can make a special exception and tell you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0056
rows.name: You see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0057
rows.name:
I think katanas are super cool!
Especially dual-wielding, don't
you think it's the absolute best?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0058
rows.name:
Yes, exactly. Eventually, I'll forge a
second Adamantine Sword and unleash super
cool finishing moves with both of them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0059
rows.name:
...Hm? What's with that look? Are
you trying to mock the passion
I've devoted my long life to?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0060
rows.name:
...What? You don't care, you just want
your reward? *Sigh*... I suppose I did
make a promise to that effect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0061
rows.name:
*Sigh*... I suppose I did make
a promise to that effect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0062
rows.name:
...However, I am currently penniless. I have
dedicated my entire life to the katana, you see,
and paid absolutely no mind to worldly matters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0063
rows.name:
No, of course I didn't deceive
you! Once I forge the Adamantine
Sword, I will be invincible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0064
rows.name:
I'll hunt down every native creature on
the Black Steel Continent and earn enough
to pay your reward in no time at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0065
rows.name:
Yes... So, with that settled,
Gi Nagri! We begin production
on the katana immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0066
rows.name:
Yes! Your dream is finally
taking shape, Master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051001_MSG0067
rows.name:
Indeed! I shall forge a super cool katana
that will absolutely never break![ST:wait ]
